items.description: Disabled vehicle on I-95 southbound between 1.4 miles north of Exit 37: PA 132 WEST TO US 13 - STREET ROAD/BRISTOL PIKE and .8 miles north of Exit 37: PA 132 WEST TO US 13 - STREET ROAD/BRISTOL PIKE. There is a lane restriction.
